title: How Anthropic uses Claude in GTM Engineering
summary: Anthropic developed CLAFTS (Claude Drafts), an AI email assistant powered by the Claude API that helps sales reps draft customer replies in their own voice. Jared Sires, a GTM Product Manager with no coding experience, built the tool using Claude Code to reduce administrative work and enable faster customer communication.
